content.full_text:
December 18, 2003

Gene Murabito
Business Systems Support
417 W. Foothill Blvd., Suite 8472
Glendora, CA 91741

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-277

Dear Mr. Murabito:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice relating to your conflict-of-interest questions under the Political Reform Act.¹ Subsequent to your letter request, you advised us that you have already participated in the decision in question. The Commission is unable to provide written advice on issues regarding past conduct. (See section 83114(b); regulation 18329(b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed).

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Galena West
Counsel, Legal Division

GW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-03-277

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997 of the California Code of Regulations.
